name: Richard the Lionheart
flavor: Realms at War — legendary commander reprising Richard I of England, hero of the Third Crusade. A warrior-king who led from the front; at Arsuf he held a disciplined line under harassment, then loosed a decisive heavy charge. His Stratagems reward aggression backed by iron discipline.

orderAction.name: Command
orderAction.summary: Play 1 Command token on one of your Warriors currently in play.
